title: BrowserSession
description: Operation contract for a local browser session (e.g. BearBrowser). A BrowserSession groups WebCapture artifacts and tracks the scoped navigation context for a WorkspaceOperation. Browser sessions must not produce hidden workspace side effects: all captures, downloads, and network activity that affect operation state must be declared.

captureScope.description: Declared scope of what this session is permitted to capture. Unscoped whole-history capture is not permitted.

mode.description: Capture mode. 'none' means no capture occurs. 'explicit-urls' requires a non-empty urls list.

urls.description: Explicit URLs scoped for capture (required when mode=explicit-urls).

allowedOrigins.description: Allowed origin patterns for capture (used when mode=allowed-origins).

captureIds.description: WebCapture artifact IDs produced in this session.

downloadIds.description: TransferOperation IDs for downloads initiated in this session.

evidenceRef.description: Reference to the browser.capture.evidence artifact for this session.
